appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Database Testing' section with isolation strategy, testing approach, shared state constraints, resource limits, and example test pattern

summary: All 8 assertions for milestone m1-database-abstraction passed successfully. Database class implementation is complete and functional with proper connection management, context manager support, transaction support, error handling, and full AccountManager integration. Backward compatibility maintained (20 existing tests pass). Code duplication reduced by 100% (no direct sqlite3 calls remain in AccountManager).
